overview: FStudioX is a professional all-in-one creative editing studio inspired by Instagram's Edits app. It features four fully-equipped editors — Photo, Video, Text, and Design — each with an Instagram-style split layout (preview on top, scrollable tools on bottom). The photo editor includes 10 filter presets plus 8 manual adjustment sliders. The video editor supports trim, speed control, and video filters. All editors share a consistent red/white/black branded interface.
features: Instagram-style split layout: preview top, tools scrollable bottom
10 photo filter presets (Warm, Cool, B&W, Vintage, Clarendon, Juno, Lark, Fade, Vivid, Muted)
8 manual adjustment sliders: Brightness, Contrast, Saturation, Temperature, Tint, Blur, Sharpen, Exposure
Video trim, playback speed control, and video filter presets
Text editor with fonts, sizes, shadow/glow effects, outline, color
Design canvas with shapes, layers, fill/stroke colors
Download buttons in every editor (PNG, TXT)
Branded red/white/black theme with X/FS/Studio logo
PWA install support for home screen
Projects panel with Internet Identity authentication
